steps.description: Click on the text input field labeled "Type a message" in the Microsoft Teams Coffee Agent chat interface to initiate a message.

parameters.text: I want to add a coffee shop

steps.description: Type text: 'I want to add a coffee shop' into the message input field at the bottom of the Microsoft Teams interface within the Coffee Agent chat conversation.
Press the "Enter" key to submit the message "I want to add a coffee shop" in the chat interface of the Coffee Agent application within Microsoft Teams.
@assertion  "I'll add the coffee shop to your list" exist
Click the "Close" (X) button at the top-right corner of the Google Chrome window to close the Microsoft Teams web application tab displaying the "contact-exporterdev" interface.
